# FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel.ChannelStatus

**Enumeration**

The status of a message channel.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ChannelStatus
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel.ChannelStatus.closed**: The message channel is closed and can no longer send or receive messages.
- **FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel.ChannelStatus.ready**: The message channel is ready to send and receive messages.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
